prompts_findings.prompt_lead: You are the wiki retriever for my challenge. Your job: find every piece of inter

risks_fired.evidence: Write your findings to sources/wiki-retrieval.md, one paragraph per finding
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add 'Append; never overwrite.' to the write instruction so re-runs don't halt the real-time synthesizer feed.

risks_fired.evidence: 1. Propose 6-8 search terms ... Ask me to confirm or sharpen them before running anything
risks_fired.fix_hint: Preamble is navigable here; a body note priming the student to skim to the search-term list is lower-cost than structural change.

risks_fired.evidence: Every finding cites the specific page title and URL you actually opened
risks_fired.fix_hint: Require a quoted sentence from the page alongside the URL: 'quote one sentence from the page; if you cannot quote, write [CITATION UNSUPPORTED].'

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: You are the docs retriever for my challenge. Your job: find the relevant recent

risks_fired.evidence: Write your findings to sources/docs-retrieval.md, what documents and threads show
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add 'Append; never overwrite.' to the write instruction.

risks_fired.evidence: 1. Ask me for three clues: names of documents I remember, people I've been mailing about this
risks_fired.fix_hint: Same body-note approach as wiki retriever — minimal structural intervention needed.

risks_fired.evidence: Every finding cites the specific document name (and path or URL) or email thread you actually opened
risks_fired.fix_hint: Require a direct quote from the document alongside the citation to force real retrieval over inference.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: You are the internet retriever for my challenge. Your job: find practitioner-gra

risks_fired.evidence: Write your findings to sources/internet-retrieval.md, what each practitioner says
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add 'Append; never overwrite.' to prevent synthesizer feed breakage on follow-up nudges.

risks_fired.evidence: 1. Propose 4-6 specific authors or recent articles worth reading. Ask me to confirm or replace any before fetching.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Same body-note mitigation as other retrievers.

risks_fired.evidence: Every finding cites the URL you actually fetched and the author
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add quote-the-sentence enforcement; aggregator or news-site URLs pass the [NOT FOUND] gate while violating practitioner-direct intent.

risks_fired.evidence: No vendor blogs. No analyst predictions. Practitioners writing about their own work, last 6 months.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add explicit source-type labeling per finding — [practitioner direct] / [practitioner analysis] / [general press] / [excluded] — so the synthesizer inherits clean source provenance rather than the student having to adjudicate in memory.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Push another round. What did the first pass miss? Different angles, related sour

risks_fired.evidence: keep going until the file feels complete or you genuinely don't find new material
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add a stop-condition that requires naming three specific uncovered topics rather than a felt-sense declaration of completeness.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: You are the synthesizer for my challenge. Three retrievers are running concurren

risks_fired.evidence: Decide: extend an existing page, or write a new one?
risks_fired.fix_hint: Resolve the decision in the prompt rather than deferring to Claude: 'extend in place without asking; note what you changed at the bottom of the file.'

risks_fired.evidence: The loop: 1. Wait for any new content in sources/. When a file appears (or grows), read it.
risks_fired.fix_hint: A body note priming the student to watch for the first sources/ write rather than waiting for the plan narration to resolve is lower-cost than structural change.

risks_fired.evidence: write a one-paragraph note at memory/_synthesis-m3.md naming what changed, what's now sharper
risks_fired.fix_hint: Anchor the synthesis note to file evidence: 'list each memory file you actually changed by name; if fewer changed than the retrieval count, say so.'

risks_fired.evidence: That contradiction line is load-bearing — flag it, don't smooth it.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Require verbatim quotes for the contradiction rather than paraphrase: 'name the exact conflicting claims from each source verbatim; do not paraphrase into resolution.'

rerun_note: PASS after Agents 101 rebase and surgical prompt/body edits on 2026-05-04; body-callout/self-audit calibration applied where evidence-backed Debriefs are intentional.
